name: Bombril S.A.
summary: Bombril S.A. manufactures and sells household products in Brazil. The company offers air fresheners, cleaners, cleaning cloths, deodorant oils, footwear deodorizers, disinfectants, detergents, garbage bags, insecticides, ironing facilitators, metal polishes, odor neutralizers, oven cleaners, plungers, polishes, repellents, sachets, soap bars and pastes, softeners, solvents, sponges, steel wools, and drain tablets. It also provides chlorinated, clothes wash, personal hygiene, mold preventing, prewash, and scouring products. The company was formerly known as Abrasivos Bombril Ltda and changed its name to Bombril S.A. in 1984. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Bernardo do Campo, Brazil.
